name: Bosera SZSE RAFI 200 Index ETF
summary: Bosera SZSE RAFI 200 Index ETF is an exchange traded fund launched and managed by Bosera Asset Management Co., Ltd.√Ç¬† The fund invests in the public equity markets of China. It seeks to invest in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund invests in stocks of companies across all market capitalizations. It seeks to replicate the performance of the SZFI 200 Index (Price Index), by investing in stocks of companies as per their weightings in the Index. Bosera SZSE RAFI 200 Index ETF was formed on June 10, 2011 and is domiciled in China.
